faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What if I forget my password?
faq.a1: Use the 'Forgot Password' feature on the login page. We will send a reset link to your registered email. Ensure your recovery email is active.
faq.t1: Store passwords in a secure manager to avoid this issue.
faq.a2: We use military-grade encryption and the latest security protocols. However, security also depends on your practices like using strong passwords and 2FA.
faq.t2: Security is a shared responsibility between platform and user.
faq.a3: Contact support@chess.cloud immediately or use the emergency form on this page. Include transaction details and relevant proof.
faq.t3: The faster you report, the faster we can take action.
faq.a4: Transactions confirmed on the blockchain cannot be cancelled. Ensure the destination address is correct before sending.
faq.t4: Always verify the recipient address at least twice before sending.

modal.title: 🚨 Report Security Issue
modal.warning: Use this form only for serious security issues such as:
